reasoning: Eight prior-work matches found, all meeting hit criteria via semantic >=0.7 and functional >=0.7. Multiple direct functional twins exist: Attack-Defense Co-Evolution (func 0.92), Multi-Agent Evolve (func 0.88), Digital Red Queen (func 0.86), RED QUEEN GUARD (func 0.82). The candidate even admits in its novelty_claim that these works already cover adversarial coevolution. The combination tweaks (alternating + second-price + K-consecutive) are 'small extension' add-ons insufficient to clear the prior-art bar. total_hits=8 >> 1, therefore FAIL.
